log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Air Genasi — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+6=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Air Genasi — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. 17 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:19+6=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.

══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Air Genasi — Winged Striker --- HP: 36/67 | AC: 14

--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:17+6=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
